# bowtie_collection (Data Source)

Look up an existing collection by name, for example to reference its ID from a resource location of type `collection`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "bowtie_collection" "internal_endpoints" {
  name = "Internal Endpoints"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the collection to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the collection.
- `id` (String) Internal collection ID.
